templates.title: Concept Explainer
templates.description: Explain complex concepts in simple terms with examples.
templates.content:
Explain {{concept}} to someone who is {{audience}}.

Use the following approach:
1. Simple definition (1-2 sentences)
2. Real-world analogy
3. Key components or principles
4. Common examples
5. Why it matters
6. Common misconceptions

Tone: {{tone}}
Depth: {{depth}}

variables.name: audience
variables.defaultValue: a high school student with no technical background

variables.name: depth
variables.defaultValue: intermediate - enough to understand the basics and some applications

examples:
Explain machine learning to someone who is a high school student with no technical background.

Use the following approach:
1. Simple definition (1-2 sentences)
2. Real-world analogy
3. Key components or principles
4. Common examples
5. Why it matters
6. Common misconceptions

Tone: friendly and approachable
Depth: intermediate - enough to understand the basics and some applications

templates.title: Project Planner
templates.description: Create detailed project plans with timelines and milestones.
templates.content:
Create a project plan for {{project}}.

Details:
- Team size: {{team_size}}
- Timeline: {{timeline}}
- Budget: {{budget}}
- Resources: {{resources}}

Please include:
1. Project overview and objectives
2. Work breakdown structure
3. Timeline with milestones
4. Resource allocation
5. Risk assessment
6. Success metrics
7. Communication plan

variables.name: project
variables.defaultValue: launching a new mobile app for fitness tracking

variables.name: resources
variables.defaultValue: existing design system, cloud infrastructure, testing tools

examples:
Create a project plan for launching a new mobile app for fitness tracking.

Details:
- Team size: 5 developers, 1 designer, 1 product manager
- Timeline: 3 months
- Budget: $50,000
- Resources: existing design system, cloud infrastructure, testing tools

Please include:
1. Project overview and objectives
2. Work breakdown structure
3. Timeline with milestones
4. Resource allocation
5. Risk assessment
6. Success metrics
7. Communication plan
